如果能保持，绝对不比那本差。
这本书讲究的就是一个报仇不过三秒钟，有仇当场就报，看谁不爽上去邦邦就是俩拳。路过的狗不听话可能都要挨俩大比兜。
当然，接触网文不久的不建议观看，我怕你们说我收钱了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1705309927,"group_id":"7239683628400118836","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"10000+小时老白毒者百毒不侵！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3CgLxABkIpcFHT3GZ/aJu+FToMsMSkJClgRjaI3t+gc","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1528003383ea413d865326c419dff70a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707736&x-signature=lEc%2BVEbHpowaJo%2FmMxOj6HckYX4%3D","user_id":"3614791318112445","user_name":"勇敢De牛牛"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3614791318112445","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1774681748,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"},{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7239683628400118836","book_info":{"abstract":"[傻逼宿主，你踏马要不要看看你都在做些什么！]

[老子让你防守一波，不是放手一搏!]

[十个世界了，老子带着你穿越了十个世界了，不但一毛本源没有赚到，还亏得裤子都没有了！]

“这能怪我吗？你没看见正道联盟那群伪君子都骑到头上来了吗？”

“你堂堂一个系统，没有签到领修为法宝的功能我就忍了，一天到晚还发布些莫名其妙的任务。”

“老子也受够了，就连老子逛个合欢宗，你都要教老子用什么姿势!”

“说什么带我装逼带我飞，结果每个世界都被别人打成狗。”

“做系统做到你这个份上真是丢系统的脸，要是老子当系统，宿主一个月就能天下无敌!”

[啊啊啊啊！老子和你拼了，你这个傻缺!]

“来呀，老子怕你不成！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o3645db6d5978490c0b075037f3be0dfa~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"一个闲客","author_id":"","book_id":"7239683628400118836","book_name":"系统挂了，我成了系统","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7239891795512197664","read_count":"250","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"123965"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.7","serial_count":"59","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,诸天万界","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o3645db6d5978490c0b075037f3be0dfa~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779300732&x-signature=XOb2J2QAc541%2B%2Fq0z80B1DiKW%2Fg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"91727305053","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"47"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220212119B7DA6F073D616D69608"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8364,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1007},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author
